question: How many premium users do we have?
schema: Table: dim_users (user_id, name, email, country, is_premium, signup_date)
sql: SELECT COUNT(user_id) FROM dim_users WHERE is_premium = TRUE;

question: What is the total revenue from all sales?
schema: Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT SUM(revenue) FROM fact_sales;

question: Show me the top 3 best-selling product categories by quantity.
schema: Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost) | Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(f.quantity) AS total_sold FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY total_sold DESC LIMIT 3;

question: How many users signed up in the USA?
schema: Table: dim_users (user_id, name, email, country, is_premium, signup_date)
sql: SELECT COUNT(user_id) FROM dim_users WHERE country = 'USA';

question: What is the total profit generated by non-premium users?
schema: Table: dim_users (user_id, name, email, country, is_premium, signup_date) | Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT SUM(f.profit) FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_users u ON f.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.is_premium = FALSE;

question: Which product name has the highest unit price?
schema: Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost)
sql: SELECT product_name FROM dim_products ORDER BY unit_price DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Calculate the average profit margin for each product category.
schema: Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost) | Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(f.profit) / SUM(f.revenue) AS avg_profit_margin FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.category;

question: Find the email addresses of users who bought an Enterprise License.
schema: Table: dim_users (user_id, name, email, country, is_premium, signup_date) | Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost) | Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT DISTINCT u.email FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_users u ON f.user_id = u.user_id JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'Enterprise License';

question: How many total sales transactions are there?
schema: Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT COUNT(sale_id) FROM fact_sales;

question: What is the average unit price across all products?
schema: Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost)
sql: SELECT AVG(unit_price) FROM dim_products;

question: List all product categories we sell.
schema: Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost)
sql: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM dim_products;

question: How many countries do our users come from?
schema: Table: dim_users (user_id, name, email, country, is_premium, signup_date)
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT country) FROM dim_users;

question: What is the total quantity of all items sold?
schema: Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT SUM(quantity) FROM fact_sales;

question: Show the top 5 countries by number of users.
schema: Table: dim_users (user_id, name, email, country, is_premium, signup_date)
sql: SELECT country, COUNT(user_id) AS user_count FROM dim_users GROUP BY country ORDER BY user_count DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What is the maximum revenue from a single sale?
schema: Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT MAX(revenue) FROM fact_sales;

question: What is the minimum unit cost among all products?
schema: Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost)
sql: SELECT MIN(unit_cost) FROM dim_products;

question: How many SaaS Subscription products do we have?
schema: Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost)
sql: SELECT COUNT(product_id) FROM dim_products WHERE category = 'SaaS Subscription';

question: What is the total revenue from SaaS Subscriptions?
schema: Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost) | Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT SUM(f.revenue) FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'SaaS Subscription';

question: How many distinct users have made at least one purchase?
schema: Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM fact_sales;

question: What is the total profit from all sales?
schema: Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT SUM(profit) FROM fact_sales;

question: Which product category has the most products?
schema: Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost)
sql: SELECT category, COUNT(product_id) AS product_count FROM dim_products GROUP BY category ORDER BY product_count DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Show the revenue breakdown by country.
schema: Table: dim_users (user_id, name, email, country, is_premium, signup_date) | Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT u.country, SUM(f.revenue) AS total_revenue FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_users u ON f.user_id = u.user_id GROUP BY u.country ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

question: What is the average quantity per transaction?
schema: Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT AVG(quantity) FROM fact_sales;

question: How many products cost more than 500 dollars?
schema: Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost)
sql: SELECT COUNT(product_id) FROM dim_products WHERE unit_price > 500;

question: What is the total revenue from premium users by product category?
schema: Table: dim_users (user_id, name, email, country, is_premium, signup_date) | Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost) | Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(f.revenue) AS total_revenue FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_users u ON f.user_id = u.user_id JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE u.is_premium = TRUE GROUP BY p.category;

question: How many sales did non-premium users make?
schema: Table: dim_users (user_id, name, email, country, is_premium, signup_date) | Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT COUNT(f.sale_id) FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_users u ON f.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.is_premium = FALSE;

question: What is the average revenue per premium user?
schema: Table: dim_users (user_id, name, email, country, is_premium, signup_date) | Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT AVG(f.revenue) FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_users u ON f.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.is_premium = TRUE;

question: Show me the top 10 most expensive products.
schema: Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost)
sql: SELECT product_name, unit_price FROM dim_products ORDER BY unit_price DESC LIMIT 10;

question: What percentage of users are premium?
schema: Table: dim_users (user_id, name, email, country, is_premium, signup_date)
sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN is_premium = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(user_id) * 100 AS premium_pct FROM dim_users;

question: How much profit did we make from Consulting Hours?
schema: Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost) | Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT SUM(f.profit) FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'Consulting Hours';

question: Which country has the most premium users?
schema: Table: dim_users (user_id, name, email, country, is_premium, signup_date)
sql: SELECT country, COUNT(user_id) AS premium_count FROM dim_users WHERE is_premium = TRUE GROUP BY country ORDER BY premium_count DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the total number of products we sell?
schema: Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost)
sql: SELECT COUNT(product_id) FROM dim_products;

question: Show me the profit for each product category sorted from highest to lowest.
schema: Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost) | Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(f.profit) AS total_profit FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY total_profit DESC;

question: How many Add-on Features were sold in total?
schema: Table: dim_products (product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, unit_cost) | Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT SUM(f.quantity) FROM fact_sales f JOIN dim_products p ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'Add-on Feature';

question: What is the average profit per sale?
schema: Table: fact_sales (sale_id, user_id, product_id, sale_timestamp, quantity, revenue, profit)
sql: SELECT AVG(profit) FROM fact_sales;

question: List the names of all premium users from Germany.
schema: Table: dim_users (user_id, name, email, country, is_premium, signup_date)
sql: SELECT name FROM dim_users WHERE is_premium = TRUE AND country = 'Germany';
